title: 5 million have dropped ACA insurance after Trump and the GOP let prices skyrocket
description: The number of people who signed up for a health plan and then didn't pay their premium fell much more sharply than it has in years past. Trump officials blame fraud. Health policy experts blame costs.
text:
The number of people who signed up for a health plan and then didn't pay their premium fell much more sharply than it has in years past. Health policy experts blame costs. Far more people than previously known have dropped Affordable Care Act health insurance for 2026, according to data released Friday.

Five million fewer people are currently enrolled in ACA marketplace plans compared to the record high reached last year. More than 1 million fewer people picked a plan for 2026, and then 4 million more either disenrolled or failed to pay their premiums. And therefore dropped coverage.

The report says 19.2 million people are currently enrolled in ACA insurance now. At its high, 24.2 million people were in the ACA marketplace in 2025, according to government figures.
speech_text:
5 million have dropped ACA insurance after Trump and the GOP let prices skyrocket.

The number of people who signed up for a health plan and then didn't pay their premium fell much more sharply than it has in years past. Health policy experts blame costs. Far more people than previously known have dropped Affordable Care Act health insurance for 2026, according to data released Friday.

Five million fewer people are currently enrolled in ACA marketplace plans compared to the record high reached last year. More than 1 million fewer people picked a plan for 2026, and then 4 million more either disenrolled or failed to pay their premiums. And therefore dropped coverage.

The report says 19.2 million people are currently enrolled in ACA insurance now. At its high, 24.2 million people were in the ACA marketplace in 2025, according to government figures.
thai_text:
จํานวนคนที่สมัครแผนสุขภาพ แต่ไม่ได้จ่ายค่าธรรมเนียมของพวกเขา ลดลงอย่างรวดเร็วกว่าในปัจจุบัน. ผู้เชี่ยวชาญในนโยบายสุขภาพกล่าวโทษค่าใช้จ่าย. หลายคนมากกว่าที่เคยทราบมา ได้ยกเลิกประกันสุขภาพในปี 2026 ตามข้อมูลที่เปิดเผยในวันศุกร์.

ปัจจุบันมีคนน้อยกว่า 5 ล้านคนลงทะเบียนในแผนการตลาด ACA เมื่อเทียบกับสถิติสูงที่ได้รับเมื่อปีที่แล้ว. มีคนน้อยกว่า 1 ล้านคนเลือกแผนสำหรับปี 2026 แล้วอีก 4 ล้านคนก็ไม่ลงทะเบียนหรือไม่ได้จ่ายค่าธรรมเนียม. และด้วยเหตุนี้การรับรองได้ลดลง.

รายงานบอกว่าคน 19.2 ล้านคนสมัครรับประกัน ACA ตอนนี้. ในช่วงที่สูงสุดของตลาด ACA ในปี 2025 มีคน 24.2 ล้านคน ตามข้อมูลของรัฐบาล.
